texto: I'm a lobbyist and had a career lobbying. The guy who gets elected or the lady who gets elected president of the United States will immediately be lobbying. They would be advocating to the Congress, they'll be lobbying our allies and our adversaries overseas. They'll be asking the business community and labor unions.
explicacao: Citação de Haley Barbour sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “I'm a lobbyist and had a career lobbying. The guy who gets elected or the lady who gets elected p…” articula trabalho, community, career em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como career e president.

frase_original: I'm a lobbyist and had a career lobbying. The guy who gets elected or the lady who gets elected president of the United States will immediately be lobbying. They would be advocating to the Congress, they'll be lobbying our allies and our adversaries overseas. They'll be asking the business community and labor unions.
